title: APP.ly
description: Bringing APP.ly to life in his own mod! Now everyone can enjoy this little guy!
body:
The mascot from the Notch Apple server comes to life in his own mod. APP.ly is just a basic mob mod. He will say hi when you interact with him, but mostly he just walks around, takes naps, and is overall just a cute little robot. 

Adds the APP.lyt robot mob to the game. Requires Geckolib for animations. APP.ly doesn't DO anything, but he is a cheerful little guy who is nice to have around. Compatible with EasyNPC.
